item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Disability Employment Tax Credit Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Disability Employment Tax Credit

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Disability employment tax credit expansion in the 119th Congress addressing employer incentives for hiring workers with disabilities. Builds on existing Work Opportunity Tax Credit (WOTC) structure.

What does it actually do?

  • WOTC enhancement for disability hires
  • Workplace accommodation tax credit
  • Subminimum wage 14(c) phase-out provisions
  • Cooperative-employer eligibility provisions

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with Disability Benefits Modernization Bounty Poster, #16 Brass Tacks (cooperative-class apprenticeship pipeline including disability-employment), and the Cooperative Compact’s universal 83.3% creator-keep regardless of worker class.
